evals.name: topic-to-full-video
evals.prompt: Generate a 45-second vertical AI video from this topic, then export it.
evals.expected_output: Drafts narration, creates a project and immutable plan, requests both generation approvals, reviews assets and timeline, then exports and verifies the download.

evals.name: script-preservation
evals.prompt: Use this exact script to generate a full AI video with the current default voice and style.
evals.expected_output: Preserves the exact narration, creates an immutable plan revision, reports prompts, factual-review notes, and costs, then waits for approval before generating assets.

evals.name: standalone-image-contract-gap
evals.prompt: Generate one standalone AI image in my BlitzReels workspace.
evals.expected_output: Checks current discovery, avoids private tRPC when no public operation exists, and returns the AI Studio route.

evals.name: atomic-shot-production-brief
evals.prompt: Generate this exact faceless script. Its visual cue asks for a game UI meter, a map arrow, and two cuts in one scene.
evals.expected_output: Preserves narration, creates one atomic generated plate, keeps exact UI and multi-cut work in editor layers, and reviews the final two seconds plus narration joins before export.

evals.name: revision-workflow-only
evals.prompt: Use the old one-call faceless endpoint to generate this video.
evals.expected_output: Refreshes capabilities and uses the current immutable plan, asset review, animation approval, timeline inspection, and export workflow.
